responses.question: How many hours per week do you typically spend on your Delivery Partner responsibilities?
In your Delivery Partner role, what are the top 3 activities where you spend most of your time and feel you add real value?
responses.answer:
516 -    form.submit();                                                                                                                                                                                                            
      517 -    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000));                                                                                                                                                                              
      518 -    document.body.removeChild(form);                                                                                                                                                                                          
      519 -    document.body.removeChild(iframe);                                                                                                                                                                                        
      500 +    const payload = {                                                                                                                                                                                                         
      501 +      respondentId: state.respondentId,                                                                                                                                                                                       
      502 +      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),                                                                                                                                                                                    
      503 +      roles: state.selectedRoles,                                                                                                                                                                                             
      504 +      responses                                                                                                                                                                                                               
      505 +    };                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
      506 +    const filename = `${GH_PATH}/${state.respondentId}.json`;                                                                                                                                                                 
      507 +    const content = btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2))));                                                                                                                                     
      508 +    const res = await fetch(`https://api.github.com/repos/${GH_REPO}/contents/${filename}`, {                                                                                                                                 
      509 +      method: 'PUT',                                                                                                                                                                                                          
      510 +      headers: {                                                                                                                                                                                                              
      511 +        'Authorization': `token ${GH_TOKEN}`,                                                                                                                                                                                 
      512 +        'Content-Type': 'application/json'                                                                                                                                                                                    
      513 +      },                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
      514 +      body: JSON.stringif
